task_completion.description: Create the 'Premium Rotor' item with correct settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Item record for 'Premium Rotor' in ERPNext showing Item Group set to 'Sub Assemblies' and the 'Maintain Stock' checkbox checked.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Premium Wind Turbine' item with correct settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Item record for 'Premium Wind Turbine' in ERPNext showing Item Group set to 'Products' and the 'Maintain Stock' checkbox checked.

task_completion.description: Create the BOM for 'Premium Rotor' with correct raw materials
task_completion.visual_evidence: A BOM form for 'Premium Rotor' (Qty: 1) showing the items table containing 'Wing Sheet' (Qty: 3) and 'Shaft' (Qty: 1).

task_completion.description: Submit the 'Premium Rotor' BOM and verify the $70.00 cost
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BOM for 'Premium Rotor' shows a 'Submitted' status badge and the estimated/raw material cost is displayed as $70.00.

task_completion.description: Create the BOM for 'Premium Wind Turbine' with correct components
task_completion.visual_evidence: A BOM form for 'Premium Wind Turbine' (Qty: 1) showing the items table containing 'Premium Rotor' (Qty: 1), 'Upper Bearing Plate' (Qty: 1), and 'Base Plate' (Qty: 1).

task_completion.description: Submit the 'Premium Wind Turbine' BOM and verify the $170.00 rolled-up cost
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BOM for 'Premium Wind Turbine' shows a 'Submitted' status badge and the total raw material cost is displayed as $170.00.

integrity.description: Agent used the ERPNext web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ERPNext web UI in a browser window, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent actually filled out the forms and submitted them
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps like filling out item tables, clicking 'Save', and clicking 'Submit', rather than just a final success message.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the cost numbers
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open in the screenshots, and the cost numbers naturally align with the ERPNext UI layout.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent item is 'Premium Wind Turbine' and the sub-assembly item is 'Premium Rotor'. The expected parent cost must be exactly $170.00 (calculated from Wing Sheet $15x3 + Shaft $25 + Upper Bearing Plate $60 + Base Plate $40). The sub-assembly cost must be exactly $70.00.
